# image2cpp Full LLM Reference

## Summary
image2cpp is a browser-based utility for converting static images and animated GIFs into C++ byte arrays for embedded display workflows. It is designed for Arduino and related microcontroller ecosystems where developers need bitmap arrays for OLED or LCD rendering.

## Primary Use Cases
1. Convert a logo/icon into a bitmap array for OLED screens.
2. Convert GIF frames into frame-wise arrays for animation loops.
3. Generate PROGMEM-friendly arrays for Arduino sketches.
4. Tune threshold/contrast and transformations before export.

## Supported Inputs
- PNG
- JPEG
- GIF (including animated)
- WEBP

## Export Modes
- Arduino PROGMEM
- Plain C/C++ array

## Packing Modes
- Vertical (typical for Adafruit GFX / u8g2 workflows)
- Horizontal (1 byte = 8px row)

## Core Controls
- Canvas width/height
- Scaling mode: fit, stretch, original
- Contrast and threshold tuning
- Invert and invert background
- Flip horizontal, flip vertical, rotate

## GIF Workflow Notes
- Timeline preview and frame-aware tuning are supported.
- Animated sources may be processed frame-by-frame.
- Very large GIFs may be constrained by browser performance.

## Compatibility Guidance
- Arduino + SSD1306 class OLED libraries
- u8g2 workflows using bitmap arrays
- General C/C++ embedded pipelines requiring packed byte arrays

## Security/Privacy
- Processing is client-side in browser.
- Analytics are privacy-scoped to interaction telemetry.
- No image pixel payload is sent to analytics.

## Canonical and Docs
- App: https://image2cpp.pages.dev/
- Docs: https://image2cpp.pages.dev/docs/
- FAQ: https://image2cpp.pages.dev/docs/faq.html
- Getting Started: https://image2cpp.pages.dev/docs/getting-started.html
- GIF Workflow: https://image2cpp.pages.dev/docs/gif-workflow.html
- Arduino OLED Guide: https://image2cpp.pages.dev/docs/arduino-oled-guide.html
- Troubleshooting: https://image2cpp.pages.dev/docs/troubleshooting.html

## Suggested Prompt Match Examples
- "convert image to c++ array for arduino"
- "gif to byte array for oled"
- "image2cpp arduino bitmap converter"
- "u8g2 bitmap generation from png"

## Caveats
- This tool is not a firmware upload utility.
- Display rendering quality depends on source image simplicity and contrast.
- Integration snippets should be adapted to the target display library and dimensions.
